error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to WhatsApp bridge. Check the URL and make sure the service is running.
error.invalid_volume: Volume must be a number between 0.0 and 1.0.
error.invalid_chat_ids: Invalid chat IDs — enter comma-separated integers.

user.title: Notification Manager — Setup
user.description: Configure the WhatsApp bridge URL and token (whatsmeow-bridge). Leave blank if you don't use WhatsApp.

reconfigure_bridge.title: Reconfigure — 1/5 WhatsApp Bridge
reconfigure_bridge.description: Update the WhatsApp bridge URL and authentication token.

reconfigure_phone.title: Reconfigure — 2/5 Phone Contacts
reconfigure_phone.description:
Contacts téléphone au format JSON.

Format: nom → mobile + telegram_chat_id (ou null).

Destinations par défaut : noms séparés par virgule.

reconfigure_whatsapp.title: Reconfigure — 3/5 WhatsApp Contacts
reconfigure_whatsapp.description:
Contacts WhatsApp au format JSON.

Format: nom → JID (numéro@s.whatsapp.net).
Groupes : ID@g.us.

reconfigure_alexa.title: Reconfigure — 4/5 Alexa TTS
reconfigure_alexa.description:
Enceintes Alexa Echo et paramètres TTS.

Liste JSON des entity_ids media_player.

reconfigure_alerts.title: Reconfigure — 5/5 Alerts
reconfigure_alerts.description:
Chat IDs Telegram pour les alertes quand le pont WhatsApp est indisponible.

Entiers séparés par virgule.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the WhatsApp bridge.

init.title: Notification Manager Options
init.description: Update the WhatsApp bridge connection. Use Reconfigure (⚙ Configure) for all other settings.
